ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the institution was registered */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number issued by regulatory authorities */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body overseeing the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the institution */,
  "total_loans_issued" INTEGER /* Total number of loans issued by the institution */,
  "total_loans_outstanding" REAL /* Total outstanding loan balance */,
  "total_borrowers" INTEGER /* Total number of borrowers */,
  "total_repayments_received" REAL /* Total amount of repayments received */,
  "default_rate" REAL /* Percentage of loans that have defaulted */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the borrower is associated with */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the borrower registered with the institution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the borrower (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* Unique national identification number */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the borrower */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the loan is taken */,
  "last_loan_date" TEXT /* Date of the last loan taken */,
  "next_loan_eligibility_date" TEXT /* Date when the borrower is eligible for the next loan */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowers_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the loan product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan product */,
  "loan_term_months" INTEGER /* Loan term in months */,
  "minimum_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount */,
  "maximum_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* JSON object outlining the eligibility criteria for the loan product */,
  "guarantor_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a guarantor is required */,
  "grace_period_months" INTEGER /* Number of months of grace period before interest starts accruing */,
  "early_repayment_fee" REAL /* Fee for early repayment */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Fee for late payments */,
  "collateral_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if collateral is required */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral required */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category of the loan product */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the loan product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_products_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower who received the loan */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan product */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the borrower starts repaying the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., active, paid off, defaulted) */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "interest_type" TEXT /* Type of interest (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "interest_rate_start_date" TEXT /* Date from which the interest rate is applicable */,
  "interest_rate_end_date" TEXT /* Date until which the interest rate is applicable */,
  "guarantor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guarantor (if applicable) */,
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collateral (if applicable) */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "next_repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next expected repayment */,
  "total_interest_paid" REAL /* Total interest paid so far */,
  "total_principal_paid" REAL /* Total principal paid so far */,
  "total_fees_paid" REAL /* Total fees paid so far */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the loan details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repayments" (
  "repayment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repayment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being repaid */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date the repayment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the repayment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repayment (e.g., completed, missed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, cash) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Fee for late payment */,
  "early_repayment_fee" REAL /* Fee for early repayment */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee paid with the repayment */,
  "interest_paid" REAL /* Interest paid in the repayment */,
  "principal_paid" REAL /* Principal paid in the repayment */,
  "late_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the repayment was late */,
  "next_repayment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next expected repayment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repayment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repayments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_metrics" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "num_borrowers" INTEGER /* Number of borrowers associated with the institution */,
  "portfolio_size_usd" REAL /* Total portfolio size in US$ */,
  "num_products" INTEGER /* Number of loan products offered by the institution */,
  "data_age_days" INTEGER /* Age of the data in days */,
  "loan_approval_rate" REAL /* Percentage of loan applications approved */,
  "loan_rejection_rate" REAL /* Percentage of loan applications rejected */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average loan amount issued */,
  "average_repayment_amount" REAL /* Average repayment amount */,
  "average_portfolio_size" REAL /* Average portfolio size over a period */,
  "average_default_rate" REAL /* Average default rate over a period */,
  "total_loans_paid_off" INTEGER /* Total number of loans paid off */,
  "total_loans_defaulted" INTEGER /* Total number of loans defaulted */,
  "total_loans_in_arrears" INTEGER /* Total number of loans in arrears */,
  "total_loans_outstanding" REAL /* Total outstanding loan balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is associated with */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, loan officer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the institution */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., borrower, loan, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's activity session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for access failure (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
